# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  parameters {
    string(name: 'IMAGE_TAG', defaultValue: '', description: 'The tag for the Docker image')
    string(name: 'REGISTRY_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'The URL of the registry to push the image to')
  }

  stages {
    stage('Build') {
      steps {
        sh 'docker build -t ${IMAGE_TAG} .'
      }
    }

    stage('Push') {
      steps {
        sh 'docker push ${REGISTRY_URL}/${IMAGE_TAG}'
      }
    }
  }
}
